ukm:Metadata.dc:title: Taxation of Chargeable Gains Act 1992
ukm:Metadata.dc:description: An Act to consolidate certain enactments relating to the taxation of chargeable gains.

ukm:UnappliedEffect.Comments: This amendment superseded by the FA 2008 changes to s 35 - This amendment superseded by the FA 2008 changes to s 35

ukm:InForce.Comments: Schedules 6 and 7 as they apply in relation to, or make provision about the tax implications of, schemes under section 51 and section 65

ukm:UnappliedEffect.Comments: This amendment has been superseded by the FA 2008 amendments to s 35 - This amendment has been superseded by the FA 2008 amendments to s 35

ukm:UnappliedEffect.Notes: This amendment comes into force on the day 2008 c. 4, s. 5 comes into force, see art. 1(2). That provision was brought into force on 1.12.2008 by S.I. 2008/3068, art. 2(1)(b)
ukm:UnappliedEffect.Comments: Amendment superseded by the FA 2008 changes to s 35 - Amendment superseded by the FA 2008 changes to s 35
ukm:UnappliedEffect.ukm:AffectingTitle: The Housing and Regeneration Act 2008 (Consequential Provisions) Order 2008

ukm:UnappliedEffect.Comments: Sch 5C was treated as repealed on 22.7.2004 - see separate note for reviewer - Sch 5C was treated as repealed on 22.7.2004 - see separate note for reviewer
ukm:UnappliedEffect.ukm:AffectingTitle: The Tax and Civil Partnership Regulations 2005

ukm:UnappliedEffect.Comments: Sch 5C was treated as repealed on 22.7.2004 - see separate note for reviewer - Sch 5C was treated as repealed on 22.7.2004 - see separate note for reviewer
ukm:UnappliedEffect.ukm:AffectingTitle: The Tax and Civil Partnership Regulations 2005

ukm:UnappliedEffect.Comments: Sch 5C was treated as repealed on 22.7.2004 - see separate note for reviewer - Sch 5C was treated as repealed on 22.7.2004 - see separate note for reviewer
ukm:UnappliedEffect.ukm:AffectingTitle: The Tax and Civil Partnership Regulations 2005

ukm:UnappliedEffect.Comments: Treated as never having had effect by FA 2016, Sch 13, para 3 - Treated as never having had effect by FA 2016, Sch 13, para 3
Not required - Sch 5C is repealed - Not required - Sch 5C is repealed

ukm:UnappliedEffect.Comments: Not required - Sch 5C is repealed - Not required - Sch 5C is repealed

ukm:UnappliedEffect.ukm:AffectingTitle: The Venture Capital Trust (Winding up and Mergers) (Tax) Regulations 2004

ukm:UnappliedEffect.Comments: TOES - Sub-ss (10)(11) are inserted prosp by 2016 c 11 s 15(4) - TOES - Sub-ss (10)(11) are inserted prosp by 2016 c 11 s 15(4)

ukm:UnappliedEffect.Type: words substituted by S.I. 1989/469, reg. 27(2) (as amended)
ukm:UnappliedEffect.ukm:AffectingTitle: The Personal Equity Plan (Amendment No. 2) Regulations 1997

ukm:UnappliedEffect.Type: words substituted by S.I. 1989/469, reg. 27(2A) (as amended)
ukm:UnappliedEffect.ukm:AffectingTitle: The Personal Equity Plan (Amendment No. 2) Regulations 1997

Title.Addition: Capital gains tax and corporation tax on chargeable gains

Text.Addition: This section makes provision about the rates at which capital gains tax is charged but has effect subject to—
accruing in a tax year to an individual are charged to capital gains tax at a rate of
The question as to which of the rates applies to the gains concerned is determined by section 1I (income taxed at higher rates or gains exceeding unused basic rate band).
... Chargeable gains accruing in a tax year to the personal representatives of a deceased individual are charged to capital gains tax at a rate of
... Chargeable gains accruing in a tax year to the trustees of a settlement are charged to capital gains tax at a rate of

Para.Text: Words in Act substituted (with effect for the tax year 2020-21 and subsequent tax years) by Finance Act 2020 (c. 14), Sch. 3 paras. 7(2)(a), 8 (with Sch. 3 para. 7(3))
Pt. 1 substituted (with effect in accordance with Sch. 1 paras. 120, 123 of the amending Act) by Finance Act 2019 (c. 1), Sch. 1 para. 2
S. 1H(1A) omitted (with effect in accordance with s. 7(3) of the amending Act) by virtue of Finance Act 2025 (c. 8), s. 7(1)(a)(3) (with Sch. 2 Pts. 1, 2)
S. 1H(2) omitted (with effect in accordance with s. 12(3) of the amending Act) by virtue of Finance Act 2025 (c. 8), s. 12(1)(a)(3)
S. 1H(4A) omitted (with effect in accordance with s. 7(3) of the amending Act) by virtue of Finance Act 2025 (c. 8), s. 7(1)(c)(3) (with Sch. 2 Pts. 1, 2)
S. 1H(7) omitted (with effect in accordance with s. 7(3) of the amending Act) by virtue of Finance Act 2025 (c. 8), s. 7(1)(e)(3) (with Sch. 2 Pts. 1, 2)
Word in s. 1H(3) substituted (with effect in accordance with s. 7(3) of the amending Act) by Finance Act 2025 (c. 8), s. 7(1)(b)(i)(3) (with Sch. 2 Pts. 1, 2)
Word in s. 1H(3) substituted (with effect in accordance with s. 7(3) of the amending Act) by Finance Act 2025 (c. 8), s. 7(1)(b)(ii)(3) (with Sch. 2 Pts. 1, 2)
Words in s. 1H(3) substituted (with effect in accordance with s. 12(3) of the amending Act) by Finance Act 2025 (c. 8), s. 12(1)(b)(3)
Word in s. 1H(6) substituted (with effect in accordance with s. 7(3) of the amending Act) by Finance Act 2025 (c. 8), s. 7(1)(d)(3) (with Sch. 2 Pts. 1, 2)
Word in s. 1H(8) omitted (with effect in accordance with s. 7(3) of the amending Act) by virtue of Finance Act 2025 (c. 8), s. 7(1)(f)(i)(3) (with Sch. 2 Pts. 1, 2)
Word in s. 1H(8) substituted (with effect in accordance with s. 7(3) of the amending Act) by Finance Act 2025 (c. 8), s. 7(1)(f)(ii)(3) (with Sch. 2 Pts. 1, 2)

S. 1H(5) omitted (for the tax year 2026-27 and subsequent tax years (but in relation to investment management services whenever performed)) by virtue of Finance Act 2026 (c. 11), s. 58(6), Sch. 11 para. 2(2)(b)

Words in s. 1H(3) omitted (for the tax year 2026-27 and subsequent tax years (but in relation to investment management services whenever performed)) by virtue of Finance Act 2026 (c. 11), s. 58(6), Sch. 11 para. 2(2)(a)

Word in s. 1H(6) omitted (for the tax year 2026-27 and subsequent tax years (but in relation to investment management services whenever performed)) by virtue of Finance Act 2026 (c. 11), s. 58(6), Sch. 11 para. 2(2)(c)

S. 1H(4B) omitted (for the tax year 2026-27 and subsequent tax years (but in relation to investment management services whenever performed)) by virtue of Finance Act 2026 (c. 11), s. 58(6), Sch. 11 para. 2(2)(b)

S. 1H(9)-(11) omitted (for the tax year 2026-27 and subsequent tax years (but in relation to investment management services whenever performed)) by virtue of Finance Act 2026 (c. 11), s. 58(6), Sch. 11 para. 2(2)(d)
Word in s. 1H(1)(a) substituted (with effect in accordance with s. 8(6) of the amending Act) by Finance Act 2025 (c. 8), s. 8(5)(6) (with Sch. 2 Pt. 3)
Word in s. 1H(1)(b) substituted (with effect in accordance with s. 9(8) of the amending Act) by Finance Act 2025 (c. 8), s. 9(6)(8) (with Sch. 2 Pt. 3)
